category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Australia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入澳大利亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Australian EESS registration, RCM mark, AS/NZS 61851.1, IEC 62196-2 Type 2 and CCS2 connector standards, AS/NZS 3000 wiring rules, and ACMA EMC requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与澳大利亚EESS注册、RCM标志、AS/NZS 61851.1、IEC 62196-2 Type 2及CCS2连接器标准、AS/NZS 3000布线规则及ACMA EMC要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與澳大利亞EESS登記、RCM標誌、AS/NZS 61851.1、IEC 62196-2 Type 2及CCS2連接器標準、AS/NZS 3000布線規則及ACMA EMC要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-body assessment, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and installers should verify current Australian law, EESS registration requirements, connector requirements, wiring rules, and ACMA EMC obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可机构评审、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行澳大利亚法律、EESS注册要求、连接器要求、布线规则及ACMA EMC义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可機構評審、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行澳大利亞法律、EESS登記要求、連接器要求、布線規則及ACMA EMC義務。

answer_first.en: EESS Level 3 registration, RCM mark, Type 2 / CCS2 connector hardware redesign (GB/T 20234 connectors are incompatible), and fresh AS/NZS 61851.1 and ACMA EMC testing are the top Australian gaps for Chinese EV chargers.
answer_first.zh: EESS第3级注册、RCM标志、Type 2 / CCS2连接器硬件重新设计（GB/T 20234连接器不兼容）以及全新AS/NZS 61851.1和ACMA EMC测试，是中国电动汽车充电桩进入澳大利亚市场的主要差距。
answer_first.zht: EESS第3級登記、RCM標誌、Type 2 / CCS2連接器硬體重新設計（GB/T 20234連接器不相容）以及全新AS/NZS 61851.1和ACMA EMC測試，是中國電動汽車充電樁進入澳大利亞市場的主要差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, accredited body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
